strategy.name: Contrarian Golden/Death Cross with Mean Reversion Confirmation
strategy.description: Uses the golden/death cross to define the regime, then fades the trend — buying exhaustion during death cross regimes and selling exhaustion during golden cross regimes. Four confirmation indicators prevent entries into raw momentum: RSI(14) for stretch, Bollinger Bands for statistical extension, Stochastic RSI for precise timing, and volume for capitulation confirmation.

indicators.regime_5m_ma50_ma200: MA50 vs MA200 calculated on 5-minute candles — 5-day view. MA50 on 5m = 50×5min = ~4.2 hours. MA200 on 5m = 200×5min = ~16.7 hours. Death cross (MA50 < MA200) = buy regime. Golden cross (MA50 > MA200) = sell regime.
indicators.rsi_7: RSI over 7 periods — faster than RSI(14), better suited for 5m crypto. Below 25 = deeply oversold. Above 75 = deeply overbought. Tighter thresholds filter weaker signals.
indicators.bollinger_bands: 20-period BB with 2 standard deviations. Price at/beyond lower band on 5m = statistically exhausted downside. Price at/beyond upper band = statistically exhausted upside.
indicators.stoch_rsi: Stochastic RSI (14,14,3,3). Extreme thresholds: below 10 = deeply oversold (not just 20), above 90 = deeply overbought (not just 80). Higher bar = better timing.
indicators.volume_booster: Volume is a SIGNAL STRENGTH BOOSTER, not a gate. High volume (≥1.5x avg) on an oversold condition = higher confidence = larger position size. Low volume = smaller size but trade still valid.
indicators.vwap_bands: VWAP with ±1σ and ±2σ bands anchored to session start. Price at ±2σ VWAP band = institutionally significant exhaustion level. Used as strength booster.
indicators.atr_14: ATR(14) on 5m candles for dynamic stop placement. Stop = 1.5x ATR from entry. Scales with actual volatility rather than fixed %.

regime.source: 5-minute candles — MA50 vs MA200 on the 5-day/5m chart (matches TradingView 5D view)
regime.death_cross: MA50 (5m) is below MA200 (5m) — short-term bearish. Bot looks for BUY signals only (contrarian: fade oversold dips).
regime.golden_cross: MA50 (5m) is above MA200 (5m) — short-term bullish. Bot looks for SELL signals only (contrarian: fade overbought exhaustion).

long: REGIME: 5m MA50 below 5m MA200 (death cross — looking for BUY signals only)
RSI(7) at or below 25 — deeply oversold on 5m timeframe
Stochastic RSI (14,14,3,3) at or below 10 — deeply oversold momentum timing
short: REGIME: 5m MA50 above 5m MA200 (golden cross — looking for SELL signals only)
RSI(7) at or above 75 — deeply overbought on 5m timeframe
Stochastic RSI (14,14,3,3) at or above 90 — deeply overbought momentum timing
entry_rules.note: BB Lower/Upper is NOT a hard gate — it is a signal strength booster. Price at/beyond the band increases position size but never blocks a trade.

signal_strength_boosters: Volume ≥ 1.5x 20-period average — capitulation / exhaustion confirmed, increases position size
Price at VWAP ±2σ band — institutional-grade exhaustion level, increases position size
Deeper daily regime separation (MA50d vs MA200d gap) — stronger macro conviction, increases position size
exit_rules: Primary: Price reverts to Bollinger Band middle (20-period SMA) — mean reversion target hit
Stop loss: 1.5x ATR(14) below entry for longs, above entry for shorts — dynamic, volatility-scaled
Time stop: If position not at target within 15 candles (75 minutes on 5m), exit — it's become a trend not a reversion
Take profit: 2.5x ATR(14) from entry for full exit
risk_rules: Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env — scales 20%-100% with signal strength
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Volume acts as position sizer, not a blocker — low volume = smaller size, high volume = full size
Spot trading only: shorts require holding the asset; buys only in death cross regime
Paper trade first — validate fill quality and slippage before going live
notes: Research-backed contrarian strategy for 5m crypto. Key professional insights applied: (1) Daily MA200 for regime — 5m MAs are too noisy. (2) RSI(7) at 25/75 — faster and more selective than RSI(14) at 35/65. (3) StochRSI at 10/90 — extreme readings only. (4) Volume flipped from gate to booster — high volume on oversold = stronger signal. (5) ATR-based stops scale with actual volatility. (6) 15-candle time stop prevents trend-fighting.
